## Summary

## Platform checklist

- [ ] Terraform was formatted with `terraform fmt -recursive`.
- [ ] Terraform was validated with `terraform validate` or `make validate`.
- [ ] TFLint, security, and policy checks were run locally or in CI.
- [ ] Module README, Backstage catalog metadata, or runbooks were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Cost, ownership, and environment tags are present for new AWS resources.
- [ ] Production-impacting changes include rollback notes.
